ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition Of Final Distribution Or Further Petition For Approval Of Status
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee for Lani Tang (Administrator).

Ms. Yee stated that she has a second report, that the Administrator (Lani) has not signed it, and that Lani is an Accountant in the height of tax season and in Los Angeles. Ms. Yee also stated that Lani was attempting to do the taxes on her own for 2015, 2016 and 2017, that she realized she needed help from a CPA, that she is attempting to get the 2017 taxes filed by the deadline, that the 2016 returns need to be amended and that the 2015 taxes need to be filed. Furthermore, Ms. Yee stated that the fidelity share stocks still need to be sold and requested a six month continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
